name: Silver
help: Silver eBPF network accountability plugin — full process-to-packet correlation with nDPI L7 DPI

sub_commands.name: start
sub_commands.desc: Attach all BPF programs (cgroup + sock_ops + XDP)

sub_commands.name: stop
sub_commands.desc: Detach all BPF programs and clean up

sub_commands.name: flows
sub_commands.desc: Dump current flow table with process correlation

sub_commands.name: stream
sub_commands.desc: Stream ring buffer events via callback

sub_commands.name: ndpi-start
sub_commands.desc: Start nDPI L7 DPI engine with AF_XDP consumer

sub_commands.name: ndpi-stop
sub_commands.desc: Stop nDPI engine and AF_XDP consumer

sub_commands.name: ndpi-flows
sub_commands.desc: Dump nDPI classified flows with L7 protocol names
